creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 150198
Patch to update graphics/maim to 3.3.41

Hi,
I have a patch to update the port graphics/maim to it's latest version: 3.3.41. This update also installs the man page. Keep in mind that 3.3.41 is the first release to include a man page, and that previous versions didn't include a man page.

The Poudriere Build Log will follow.
Thanks,
Neel
